results.title: Sharp Launches AQUOS R11 Smartphone: Unique backlit breathing design, equipped with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4
results.description: Igeekphone reported on June 16th that Sharp has officially launched the AQUOS R11 mobile phone. This model is targeted at the mid-to-high-end market and is equipped with the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor. It will go on sale starting from July 9th, but the price of the unlocked version (SIM Free version) has not [...] The post Sharp Launches AQUOS R11 Smartphone: Unique backlit breathing design, equipped with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 appeared first on IGeeKphone China Phone, Tablet PC, VR, RC Drone News, Reviews .
